name: W
description: $W started quietly and grew around a simple idea: wins that don’t come at someone else’s expense. Without much noise, $W has been continuously used to support small streamers, community giveaways, and real-world causes — not as a promise, but as a pattern that’s already formed. Supply has steadily tightened over time, with a large portion bought back and locked long-term, while ongoing burns continue in the background.
